2603.25551.title: Voxtral TTS
2603.25551.paper_summary: We introduce Voxtral TTS, an expressive multilingual text-to-speech model that generates natural speech from as little as 3 seconds of reference audio. Voxtral TTS adopts a hybrid architecture that combines auto-regressive generation of semantic speech tokens with flow-matching for acoustic tokens. These tokens are encoded and decoded with Voxtral Codec, a speech tokenizer trained from scratch with a hybrid VQ-FSQ quantization scheme. In human evaluations conducted by native speakers, Voxtral TTS is preferred for multilingual voice cloning due to its naturalness and expressivity, achieving a 68.4\% win rate over ElevenLabs Flash v2.5. We release the model weights under a CC BY-NC license.
2603.25551.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹Voxtral TTS，一個表現豐富的多語言文本轉語音模型，能夠從僅3秒的參考音頻生成自然語音。Voxtral TTS採用混合架構，結合了語義語音標記的自回歸生成與聲學標記的流匹配。這些標記通過Voxtral Codec進行編碼和解碼，這是一個從零開始訓練的語音標記器，使用混合VQ-FSQ量化方案。在由母語者進行的人類評估中，Voxtral TTS因其自然性和表現力而被偏好用於多語言聲音克隆，實現了68.4%的勝率，超過了ElevenLabs Flash v2.5。我們在CC BY-NC許可下發布模型權重。
